regime_badge_text: Positive Gamma - Containment and Mean Reversion
regime_paragraph_1: Spot currently trades near 7150 within the dominant control zone marked by concentrated flow around 7150 strike. Positive net gamma of +6.12B underpins a regime of dampened volatility and mean-reverting tendencies as dealers hedge by buying dips and selling rallies, which structurally contain large moves and enhance premium decay.
regime_paragraph_2: The nearest active control point is the call wall at 7200, located about 65 points above spot and serving as a soft cap that encourages mean reversion lower if tested. The put side is distant with a heavier concentration well below at 6800, minimizing immediate downside magnetism. Charm remains a secondary intraday factor currently as we are not near pinning proximity or late day; it modestly supports intraday drift consistency without forcing fixation near any level.
regime_paragraph_3: Moderate vanna relevance suggests vol shifts could influence directional hedging subtly but do not override the dominant positive gamma structure. Acceptance above 7200 would expand control zone and reinforce upside containment. Failure to hold above 7150 would bring the nearby support at 7050 into play, raising risk of temporary negative gamma patches if spot dips below 6800 support. Currently, regime cohesion depends on maintaining spot inside the 7150 control corridor and respecting the call wall ceiling near 7200.
primary_setup_body: With positive gamma and spot well inside the 6800–7200 control range, selling iron condors optimizes gamma decay while capitalizing on mean reversion. The 6800 put wall floor and 7200 call wall cap define natural risk boundaries. This structure profits from contained moves and premium erosion driven by dealer hedging inside these levels.
secondary_setup_body: Selling call credit spreads from 7200 to 7250 strikes aligns with the active call wall resistance and positive gamma profile above spot. This approach benefits from the upper boundary dampening rallies and accelerates premium decay if spot remains under 7200 acceptance.
avoid_body: Avoid long directional debit spreads given the positive gamma regime's tendency to revert and contain. Directional bets increase risk of accelerated losses if spot remains range-bound under gamma control.
wildcard_body: While charm currently plays a minor role, it can strengthen pinning dynamics if spot approaches 7200 near market close, potentially compressing price action tightly. Monitor charm signals for signs of late-session fixation near the call wall.

options_trade_ideas.name: Iron Condor 6800–7200
options_trade_ideas.thesis: Trade within well-defined positive gamma control zone to collect premium decay and benefit from mean reversion.
options_trade_ideas.structure: Sell 6800 put spread and 7200 call spread wide iron condor.
options_trade_ideas.when_valid: Spot holds between 6800 and 7200 during early and mid sessions.
options_trade_ideas.risk_note: Invalidates if spot decisively breaks below 6800 or rises significantly above 7200.

options_trade_ideas.name: 7200–7250 Call Credit Spread
options_trade_ideas.thesis: Cap upside risk by selling calls near active call wall resisting rallies above spot.
options_trade_ideas.structure: Sell 7200 call, buy 7250 call call credit spread.
options_trade_ideas.when_valid: Spot remains below 7200 and gamma stays positive.
options_trade_ideas.risk_note: Invalidates if spot accepts above 7200 with momentum.

timing_notes.note: Gamma effects begin to dominate pushing contained price action between 6800 and 7200.
Charm can start influencing intraday drift but does not yet enforce pinning away from call wall.
Optimal time to execute iron condors or call credit spreads as gamma and charm synergize.
Charm effects intensify if spot nears 7200, possibly compressing late-day volatility.

summary_cards.pin_zone: No near-term pinning; spot inside broad positive gamma control zone
summary_cards.bull_trigger: Acceptance above 7200 expands control zone higher
summary_cards.bear_trigger: Failure to hold above 6800 risks regime invalidation and volatility pick-up
summary_cards.wildcard: Late-day charm may induce pinning near 7200 but currently secondary
